Awakener - 90 to guarantee Pity for it, or every 3rd Awakener Pull
WoD - 60 to guarantee Pity for it, or every 2nd WoD Pull
Pity (Pull Count) carries over between the same Banner. Ie; Awakener / WoD Event Banner
PULL COUNT

please <:Sendflowers:1400771545370067118>

Myriam, can work into Full Lemurian Comps with GMurphy as the Core. You should be getting no higher than E2 for her Enlightenments, and obtaining her WoD is unnecessary as you can  simply use any generic Keyflare / Aliemus just fine

On the other hand, Daffodil has an argument of raising her to OE (E3 +4) but that is a very big investment and is generally not recommended for newer players as they would be better off just running Characters like Castor / Kath / Pollux / GMurphy / Mouchette at E3 instead and would compete much better than her

Lastly, Doresain is just hot ass and nobody should be pulling for him even as a joke as you're essentially bricking your account by doing so. He deals comparatively less Damage than older Units, on top of Standard Characters and is jusf overall not worth it

Hello! I saw that when you reach level 60, you need Gnosis Primer and then Refined Gnosis Primer to reach level 70 and then 80. I'm not at that point in the game yet, but I'd be curious to know how many of each you need to reach level 80. If someone can tell me it <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>

60+
1 Gnosis Primer = 2 levels
70+
1 Refined Gnosis Primer + 1 Gnosis Primer = 2 levels
Total:
5 Refined 10 Gnosis Primer to "max" out a unit
